name: Cloudflare
description: Content delivery, security, and edge platform providing CDN, DNS, Workers, and many networking services accessible via APIs.

auth_methods.note: Cloudflare documents API Tokens (bearer tokens), Global API Key (API key with X-Auth-Key/X-Auth-Email), and OAuth as supported authentication methods.

credential_access.note: API Tokens are created and managed from the dashboard; dashboard signup has a free plan. Global API Key and API Tokens are accessible from the dashboard for any account.

api_surface.note: Cloudflare exposes a broad REST API surface (https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/) covering zones, DNS, account settings, Workers, and more; extensive developer docs exist for many product areas.

buildability.note: Public REST APIs + self-serve API Tokens/keys on free accounts allow building integrations today. Some enterprise-only APIs/features require contacting sales or an Enterprise plan, but core API functionality is accessible.

queries: Cloudflare API authentication API Tokens Global API Key OAuth
Cloudflare API REST endpoints api.cloudflare.com client v4
Cloudflare signup free plan API access
Cloudflare enterprise contact sales enterprise-only APIs
